case_title: ZAHID SHAIKH VS. ALEX LAWRENCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA HOTEL SUTTER LARKIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, ALEX THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1048 LARKIN STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 - UNIT 9 / SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA HOTEL SUTTER LARKIN AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, ALEX
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE OF AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA HOTEL SUTTER LARKIN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, ALEX
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $53.33 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA HOTEL SUTTER LARKIN
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA HOTEL SUTTER LARKIN AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, ALEX DOES 1 TO 10

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA HOTEL SUTTER LARKIN AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, ALEX DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA HOTEL SUTTER LARKIN AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, ALEX DOES 1 TO 10
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT , UD-110, POS-010 AND DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA HOTEL SUTTER LARKIN AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, ALEX
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA HOTEL SUTTER LARKIN AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, ALEX
DECLARATION OF ORAL LEASE/RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA HOTEL SUTTER LARKIN
AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA HOTEL SUTTER LARKIN SERVED FEB-23-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, ALEX
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE-UNLAWFUL DETAINER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID DBA HOTEL SUTTER LARKIN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, ALEX
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, ALEX
